opinion.h1: MEMORIAL GARDENS ASSN. v. SMITH, 361 U.S. 31 (1959)
opinion.h4: MEMORIAL GARDENS ASSOCIATION, INC., ET AL. v. SMITH, AUDITOR OF PUBLIC ACCOUNTS OF ILLINOIS, ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF ILLINOIS. No. 288. Decided October 19, 1959.
opinion.p: Appeal dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
C. Severin Buschmann and Roy P. Hull for appellants.
Grenville Beardsley, Attorney General of Illinois, and William C. Wines, Raymond S. Sarnow and A. Zola Groves, Assistant Attorneys General, for appellees.
The appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
